title: [Cobblemon] CatchCap - Neoforge
description: Simple mod that adds a level cap to wild cobblemon you can catch based on the level of your party
body:
based on [Cobblemon Catch Level Cap](https://modrinth.com/mod/catchlevelcap) by Sylvonir

A simple addon for Cobblemon that adds a level cap to the wilds mons you can catch based on the level of your party

default variance is 5, can be changed via the config.
